- Airport Rail Link tickets can only be purchased at the station.

translations.- Thailand is not a tipping culture coun:
- Thailand is not a tipping culture country, so generally, tipping is not required; I only tip THB 20 for massages as a small gesture.

- Alcohol sales are only allowed from 11:00 to 14:00 and 17:00 to 24:00. Alcohol sales are prohibited all day on Buddhist holidays.

- Smoking may not be allowed on the hotel balcony, so be sure to ask.

- Emergency hotline for foreigners in foreign languages: dial `1155`

- SuperRich has business hours, so if you arrive too early or too late, you won't be able to exchange money.

translations.1. Miscalculating the bill \n It's no:
1. Miscalculating the bill  
   It’s not always intentional; you can calculate the total amount when ordering.

2. Approaching you first to show your country’s currency or ask about exchanging money,  
   then stealing, pickpocketing, or snatching when you take out your wallet.

3. Outside the Grand Palace or other attractions, scammers falsely claim the site is closed and kindly suggest you take a tuk-tuk to other places (Black Temple/black shops/**private boat tours on black boats—encountered this at the pier this time**) to trick you into spending money.

4. Tuk-tuk, shouting prices everywhere, suddenly raising the fare halfway  
   If you want to try tuk-tuks but fear being overcharged, [you can try the new MUVMI app tuk-tuk booking App](https://bkk.com.tw/muvmi-app/){:target="_blank"}  
   Even if the tuk-tuk looks good, beware of scams 3, such as overly eager drivers offering to take you to attractions or boat rides.

5. Fake staff: While waiting in line, fake staff may enthusiastically invite you inside.  
   They will introduce the dishes in your language, help you order, then ask for payment upfront and run away with the money.

6. Motorbike Rental Scams  
   Never leave your passport as a deposit, never leave your passport as a deposit, never leave your passport as a deposit.  
   If you encounter malicious claims for damages requiring compensation, leaving your passport will cause trouble.  
   Choose large chain rental shops and always record a video of the vehicle condition before renting.

7. Local Dating App Scams  
   You might encounter transgender individuals, extortion schemes, or scammers.

8. Patpong Ping Pong Show Scam: On the street, enthusiastic touts ask if you want to see a ping pong show, saying you only need to order a 100 THB drink. Then they lead you into a dark alley or a second-floor black shop.  
   The show is very bad, and when you want to leave, they demand 3,000 THB, claiming the 100 THB drink deal never existed.

9. Be cautious of pickpockets in crowded places, even at ticket entry points (e.g., Grand Palace, Wat Pho).

translations.```\n1.手提行李重量：\n每個乘客（除了嬰兒外）可以帶1件自己的行李和1件:
```
1. Carry-on Luggage Weight:
Each passenger (except infants) may bring 1 piece of personal luggage and 1 small carry-on bag, with a maximum total weight not exceeding 7 kg.

2. Carry-on Luggage Size:
- 1 piece of carry-on luggage with maximum dimensions of 56cm x 36cm x 23cm
- 1 small carry-on bag (including the following bags)
  + 1 girl's bag, magazine, camera, baby food bag, airport-purchased bag not exceeding 30cm x 20cm x 10cm, etc.
  + 1 coat bag with dimensions not exceeding 114cm x 60cm x 11cm when opened.
  + 1 laptop bag with maximum dimensions of 40cm x 30cm x 10cm
```

translations.`他們的手法都差不多，不然就是問你國家的貨幣長怎樣，他好奇可以給他看看嗎，然後趁: Their methods are similar. Sometimes they ask what your country's currency looks like, curious if you can show it to them. Then, while you take out your wallet, they pickpocket or snatch your money and run away.

translations.一出機場開始摸索如何設定、啟用 eSIM，才知道…\n\n: As soon as I left the airport, I started figuring out how to set up and activate the eSIM, only to realize…
translations.一早坐 Grab 來 [王春盛牛肉火鍋](https://maps.app.go: Early in the morning, took a Grab to [Wang Chun Sheng Beef Hotpot](https://maps.app.goo.gl/1VuwzAdKS4vH6kmj6){:target="_blank"} for breakfast. The overall flavor is quite Chinese/Taiwanese style, which I liked, but Tainan beef soup is even better.
translations.一樓進來就有 SHAKE SHACK 漢堡，第一次吃直接點 SHAKE SHAC: On the first floor, there is a SHAKE SHACK burger. For my first time, I ordered the classic SHAKE SHACK burger and the coconut milk shake, which is exclusive to Bangkok. The burger was tasty and not greasy, but I found the shake too sweet.
translations.一路往後逛到 BTS Charoen Nakhon 月台，想說先去按個一小時腳底: Walked all the way to BTS Charoen Nakhon platform and decided to get a one-hour foot massage first.
translations.一路走回大皇宮(玉佛寺在大皇宮內)，路上有很多政府機關的建築。\n\n: Walking back to the Grand Palace (the Temple of the Emerald Buddha is inside the Grand Palace), there are many government buildings along the way.
translations.上圖1–3，鵝牌清涼膏的背景，像肉燥的那個，叫 หมูสับผัดหนำเลี้: In images 1–3 above, the background with the white brand cooling balm shows a dish that looks like minced pork called หมูสับผัดหนำเลี้ยบ, which seems to be minced pork stir-fried with olive vegetables. It's very good with rice!
translations.上圖2–1，炸蚵仔煎，類似台灣士林夜市的炸彈蚵仔煎\n: In the above image 2–1, fried oyster omelette, similar to the bomb oyster omelette from Taiwan's Shilin Night Market.
translations.上圖2–2，季節限定飲品，龍眼茶\n: Figure 2-2 above, seasonal limited drink, Longan Tea
translations.上圖2–3，最特別的咖哩螃蟹(Panang Curry)，是一整隻新鮮大螃蟹下去: In the above images 2–3, the most special dish is the curry crab (Panang Curry), made with a whole fresh large crab.
translations.下船後就是鄭王廟，可以直接排隊買票進入。\n\n: After getting off the boat, you will arrive at Wat Arun, where you can directly line up to buy tickets for entry.
translations.不知道是不是廉航的原因，資訊沒更新(一直顯示 16:00，實際已變更到 16:3: Not sure if it's because of the low-cost airline, but the information wasn't updated (it kept showing 16:00, while the actual time changed to 16:35).
translations.中途有經過 [唐人街](https://www.kkday.com/zh-hk/: On the way, I passed by [Chinatown](https://www.kkday.com/zh-hk/blog/101689/bangkokchinatown?cid=19365){:target="_blank"} but forgot to take photos. It has a strong cyberpunk vibe!
translations.主動搭訕你想看你國家的貨幣或問你換錢\n等你把錢包掏出來時，偷或扒或搶\n:
Approaching you first to show your country's currency or ask about exchanging money,  
then stealing, pickpocketing, or snatching when you take out your wallet.
translations.主要是跟 [Chun-Hsiu Liu](https://medium.com/: Mainly met up with [Chun-Hsiu Liu](https://medium.com/u/72361fccaa43){:target="_blank"} to eat at the upstairs food court. ( **Cheap and delicious, highly recommended food spot** )
translations.交通：從地圖看距離最近 BTS Chong Nonsi 站 1 公里約 15 分: Transportation: According to the map, the nearest BTS Chong Nonsi station is about 1 km away, approximately a 15-minute walk.
translations.人多就要小心扒手，即使是在要買票才進去的地方 (e.g. 大皇宮、臥佛寺)\n: Be cautious of pickpockets in crowded places, even at ticket entry points (e.g., Grand Palace, Wat Pho).
translations.以上就是 2018 員工旅遊的記憶，這次全自由行重返曼谷，讓我更熟悉了這個城市，: These are the memories from the 2018 staff trip. This time, returning to Bangkok on a fully independent trip made me more familiar with the city. Compared to before, I find it more bustling, the food tastier, and prices higher.
translations.以下參考總結自曼谷貓大大的影片，我這次遇到的換/看錢詐騙就真的遇到了。\n\n: Based on the summary from Bangkok Cat's video, I actually encountered the money exchange/scam this time.
translations.但午餐我們又跑去吃了一次 SHAKE SHACK，這次換吃雞腿肉漢堡，同樣好吃。: For lunch, we went to SHAKE SHACK again, this time trying the chicken burger, which was just as delicious.
translations.假店員，在排隊候位時，會有假店員熱情招攬你們進去\n會用你的語言介紹餐點、幫你點:
Fake staff: While waiting in line, fake staff may enthusiastically invite you inside.  
They will introduce the dishes in your language, help you order, then ask for payment upfront and run away with the money.
translations.價格： `TWD $9,259` (包含加購的來回 **15 kg** 行李托運: Price: `TWD $9,259` (includes additional round-trip **15 kg** checked baggage)
translations.價格：NT 31,315 / 4 人 / 4晚。(因為太晚訂，所以很貴，早點可以: Price: NT 31,315 / 4 people / 4 nights. (It was expensive because of late booking; earlier bookings can get 40–50% off)
translations.價格：THB 350 附一杯飲料(酒)， **需提前買票預約** 。\n\n: Price: THB 350 including one drink (alcohol), **advance ticket purchase and reservation required**.
translations.再來是重頭戲火山排骨，味道蠻特別的，醬汁是香茅酸辣味道，直接套手套徒手抓起來啃，: Next is the highlight, the Volcano Ribs. The flavor is quite unique, with a lemongrass sour and spicy sauce. You put on gloves and eat it with your hands, which is very appetizing!
translations.出 BTS 不要急著下天橋，可以一路從天橋走過馬路。\n\n: After exiting the BTS, don't rush to go down the skywalk; you can walk across the road using the skywalk.
translations.出來 78 樓後可以繼續往上走來到階梯、頂樓休息區。\n\n: After exiting on the 78th floor, you can continue going up to reach the stairs and rooftop lounge area.
translations.出境、安檢完，大概還有一小時可以吃東西；找了間泰式餐廳吃了泰國的最後一餐。(海鮮: After immigration and security check, there was about an hour left to eat; found a Thai restaurant to have the last meal in Thailand (seafood fried rice, mango juice, mango sticky rice).
translations.出境完大約 13:20，曼谷機場檢查蠻嚴格的，所有東西都要過安檢，登機箱幾乎都要: After exiting around 13:20, the security at Bangkok airport was quite strict. All items had to go through security checks, and almost all carry-on luggage was opened for manual inspection.
translations.出臥佛寺之後想說先解決換錢問題，同行只有一位朋友有事先換一些泰銖，其他人都想說來: After leaving Wat Pho, we decided to handle currency exchange first. Only one friend had exchanged some Thai baht in advance; the rest planned to exchange money in Bangkok. So, we headed to the nearby [The Old Siam Shopping Plaza⁩](https://maps.app.goo.gl/UPNxgoTmtswuhHVS8){:target="_blank"} and used the SuperRich exchange inside.
translations.出門最重要的事就是安全，這邊統一整理安全及注意事項。\n\n: The most important thing when going out is safety. Here is a summary of safety tips and precautions.
translations.到 TPE 台灣桃園國際機場，領完行李出來後約 20:45，直接去搭 `1841: After arriving at TPE Taiwan Taoyuan International Airport and picking up your luggage around 20:45, take the `1841` or `1819` Kuokuang Bus directly back to Taipei. It's very convenient with no transfers needed.
translations.到站工作人員同樣會喊鄭王廟。\n\n: The station staff will also announce "Wat Arun."
translations.加上班機又延誤，實際起飛時間：17:13。\n\n: With the added flight delay, the actual departure time was 17:13.
translations.午餐也隨意在 [Mixt Chatuchak](https://maps.app: Lunch was casually had at a restaurant inside the [Mixt Chatuchak](https://maps.app.goo.gl/5PwQcFThBHtFpbzw6){:target="_blank"} mall, and the taste was quite good.
translations.參觀完再回到碼頭先找到售票亭(PIER 2) 買前往 ICONSIAM 的船票: After the visit, return to the pier and first find the ticket booth (PIER 2) to buy a boat ticket to ICONSIAM (THB 40), then proceed to PIER 1 to board.
translations.又又又是 B1R，最角落＋需要搭接駁車的登機門。\n\n: B1R again, the gate at the farthest corner + requires a shuttle bus.
translations.另外 Big C 現在好像不提供塑膠袋，要自己在賣場裡買環保袋。\n\n: Also, Big C seems to no longer provide plastic bags, so you need to buy reusable bags inside the store.
translations.另外他也有提供 Sky Bar 晚餐組合：\n\n: He also offers a Sky Bar dinner package:
translations.只有在特定場合可以抽\n: Smoking is only allowed on specific occasions.
translations.只記得有去逛百貨公司、Big C、Central World。\n\n: I only remember visiting department stores, Big C, and Central World.
translations.可以走到中間的平台拍照(⚠️樓梯很陡要小心)，很多人也會換泰服在此拍照留念。\n: You can walk to the middle platform for photos (⚠️ the stairs are steep, so be careful). Many people also change into traditional Thai outfits here for photo souvenirs.
translations.可能因為廉航的關係，沒什麼人托運，行李提領超快。\n\n: Possibly due to it being a low-cost airline, few people checked in luggage, so baggage claim was very fast.
translations.吃完又在其他攤買了椰子冰淇淋+芒果+花生甜點，也好吃！\n\n: After eating, I bought coconut ice cream with mango and peanut dessert from another stall, which was also delicious!
translations.吃完回 Central Rama 9 逛一下，這邊也有有名的 NaRaYa 曼谷: After eating, head back to Central Rama 9 for some shopping. This place also features the famous NaRaYa Bangkok bags.
translations.吃完大約 21:00，開始往市區、飯店移動。\n\n: After eating around 21:00, we started heading back to the city and the hotel.
translations.吃完繼續逛，買了一杯榴槤果汁來喝，味道很濃郁真實而且價格實惠 (THB 89)。: After eating, we continued exploring and bought a cup of durian juice. The flavor was rich and authentic, and the price was reasonable (THB 89).
translations.吃完跑去後面的 [班嘉奇蒂公園](https://maps.app.goo.gl: After eating, we went to the nearby [Benjakitti Park](https://maps.app.goo.gl/bmKhQpbw9KTtLYeN8){:target="_blank"} for a walk and tried to find the legendary [Bangkok Giant Monitor Lizard](https://tw.news.yahoo.com/%E5%B7%A8%E8%9C%A5%E4%BD%94%E9%A0%98%E5%A4%A7%E5%AD%B8-%E8%A2%AB%E5%B0%81%E6%B3%B0%E7%89%88%E4%BE%8F%E7%BE%85%E7%B4%80%E5%85%AC%E5%9C%92-104942584.html){:target="_blank"}; maybe because it was evening, we didn’t see any.
translations.吃完還外帶一盒芒果糯米飯當宵夜回飯店吃。\n\n: After eating, I also took away a box of mango sticky rice to have as a midnight snack back at the hotel.
translations.吃的我記得還行，主要是夜景很美，可以看到曼谷 [河濱夜市摩天輪](https:/: The food was okay, but the main highlight was the beautiful night view, especially the lights of the Bangkok [Riverside Night Market Ferris Wheel](https://maps.app.goo.gl/evFHo6ciFY4jswSt9){:target="_blank"}.
translations.吃飽後前往 The Rock Pub 喝酒、聽 Live。\n\n: After eating, head to The Rock Pub for drinks and live music.
translations.同事(2024)也有說，曼谷有很多很多網美咖啡廳，都很浮誇，有興趣的朋友可以查查: Colleagues (2024) also mentioned that Bangkok has many trendy, extravagant cafes. Interested friends can look them up. This one had low ratings and has already closed.
translations.同樣也是舒服又安全的新船！\n\n: Also a comfortable and safe new ship!
translations.同行友人有先換 3,000 THB，我是到當地才去 SuperRich 換。\n: My travel companion exchanged 3,000 THB in advance, while I exchanged money at SuperRich after arriving.
translations.吸貓體質，曼谷很多貓貓，馬上來蹭我\n\n: Cat lover here, there are many cats in Bangkok, and one just came to rub against me.
translations.啟用完成後，等於雙卡雙待，只是說原本的門號 SIM 卡沒買漫遊方案前沒有網路，: After activation, it works like dual SIM dual standby, but the original SIM card has no internet before purchasing a roaming plan. **In emergencies, you can still switch back to the original SIM card!**
translations.四組表演，全都是搖滾、老歌經典！\n\n: Four performances, all rock and classic oldies!
translations.回飯店後到萬豪樓上的酒吧小酌，只記得夜景漂亮、酒便宜。\n\n: After returning to the hotel, I had a few drinks at the bar upstairs in the Marriott. I only remember the beautiful night view and the cheap drinks.
translations.回飯店的路上剛好遇到下完雨的曼谷配上五彩斑斕的數位廣告螢幕，色彩對比值直接拉滿，: On the way back to the hotel, I happened to see rainy Bangkok paired with colorful digital advertising screens. The contrast of colors was maxed out, giving a strong cyberpunk vibe.
translations.回飯店給 [Chun-Hsiu Liu](https://medium.com/: Returned to the hotel to give [Chun-Hsiu Liu](https://medium.com/u/72361fccaa43){:target="_blank"} Taiwanese souvenirs, then dispersed to rest.
translations.回飯店路上去超商試了泰國的 [超商熱壓吐司](https://supertast: On the way back to the hotel, I tried Thailand's [convenience store grilled toast](https://supertaste.tvbs.com.tw/pack/347495){:target="_blank"} and Thai banana milk. The filling was melted cheese and hot dog, and the crust was crispy! The crust was crispy! The crust was crispy! It was delicious and cheap!
translations.回飯店，同行友人有買山竹來品嚐，我覺得新鮮的好吃，淡淡的甜味加上山竹的味道，很順: Back at the hotel, a friend bought some mangosteen to try. I found the fresh ones delicious, with a mild sweetness and the unique mangosteen flavor—very smooth and pleasant. Later, I tried dried mangosteen, but it wasn’t as good; it tasted dry and sour.
translations.因早已超過晚餐時間，所以只能點一些下酒菜、串燒食物。\n\n: Since it was already past dinner time, we could only order some bar snacks and skewers.
translations.因此一直想著有機會要回曼谷舊地重遊，補充六年前的回憶；但是對東南亞不熟悉，不太敢: So I always wanted to revisit Bangkok to refresh my memories from six years ago; however, not being familiar with Southeast Asia, I was hesitant to travel alone. **At the beginning of the year, while chatting with Pinkoi colleagues, we decided to organize this five-day free trip to Bangkok.**
translations.因為 6 月就已經開始新工作了，沒什麼心思在玩樂上，主要是 Mark 和 Sea: Since I started a new job in June, I haven't been focused on leisure. Mainly, Mark and Sean handled the planning and arrangements, so I didn't do much research.
translations.因為人多就直接搭 Grab (THB 135) 直接前往臥佛寺。\n\n: Since there were many of us, we took a Grab (THB 135) directly to the Wat Pho.
translations.因為到市區、飯店還要一個多小時，廉航沒有供餐，大家都飢腸轆轆，就先在機場覓食吃晚: Since it takes over an hour to reach the city and hotel, and the low-cost airline doesn't provide meals, everyone was very hungry, so we looked for food at the airport and had dinner there first.
translations.因為晚上要去昭披耶公主號郵輪+自助晚餐，所以先來到碼頭附近的百貨公司逛街。\n\: Since we were going on the Chao Phraya Princess Cruise with a buffet dinner in the evening, we first visited a department store near the pier to shop.
translations.因為等下要去 Pub 聽 Live 所以吃得比較趕，但每道菜我都覺得很好吃！！\: Because I’m going to a pub to listen to live music later, I ate quickly, but I found every dish very delicious!!
translations.在 Siam 換 Sukhumvit Line 到 Ari 站下車走一小段就是: At Siam, transfer to the Sukhumvit Line and get off at Ari station. Walk a short distance to reach LHAO LHAO restaurant.
translations.在台灣就先註冊好 [Grab](https://www.grab.com/sg/: Register for [Grab](https://www.grab.com/sg/){:target="_blank"} in Taiwan and link your credit card for easy use.
translations.在大皇宮或景點外謊稱景點關門，熱心介紹你搭嘟嘟車去其他(黑寺廟/黑商店/ **坐: Outside the Grand Palace or other attractions, scammers falsely claim the site is closed and kindly suggest you take a tuk-tuk to other places (Black Temple/black shops/**private boat tours on black boats—encountered this at the pier this time**) to trick you into spending money.
translations.在遊記開始前，先介紹一個最近 **香港** 新推出的 [日租/時租酒店](htt: Before starting the travelogue, let me introduce a newly launched booking platform in **Hong Kong** for [daily/hourly hotel rentals](https://www.common-room.hk/searchmap/page/1){:target="_blank"}, [Party Room](https://www.common-room.hk/c/partyroom){:target="_blank"} private rooms, and [yacht parties](https://www.common-room.hk/c/boatp){:target="_blank"} — [Common Room](https://www.common-room.hk/c/boatp){:target="_blank}.
translations.基本上背一個包包＋拖一個登機箱就可以了。\n\n: Basically, just carry a backpack and roll a carry-on suitcase.
translations.報到ˊ櫃檯完全沒人，到了就直接報到+完成托運手續了。\n\n: The check-in counter was completely empty. Upon arrival, I checked in and completed the baggage drop-off immediately.
translations.外國人專用外國語緊急救助電話撥 `1155`\n: Emergency hotline for foreigners in foreign languages: dial `1155`
translations.大皇宮進入有服裝規定，要特別注意！\n\n: The Grand Palace has a dress code that must be followed!
translations.天數計算方式：24小時制，eSIM激活後起算，24小時為一日（泰國時間）。\n: Day calculation method: 24-hour format, starting from eSIM activation, 24 hours count as one day (Thailand time).
translations.好像是個小樂園、跟百貨公司，希臘造景。\n\n: It feels like a small amusement park combined with a department store, featuring Greek-themed decorations.
translations.導遊特別跟店家說不踩背，只記得很高級，但是邊按會痛睡不著ＸＤ\n\n: The tour guide specifically told the shop not to do back stepping. I only remember it was very high-end, but the pressing hurt and made it hard to sleep XD
translations.左下 Phutawan普妲旺 室內擴香是昨天在洽圖洽買的，但我猜市區的百貨公司也: Bottom left: Phutawan indoor diffuser was bought yesterday at Chatuchak, but I guess department stores in the city also have it.
translations.帕蓬乒乓秀騙局，路上熱情攬客問你要不要看乒乓 Show，只要點一杯 100 TH:
Patpong Ping Pong Show Scam: On the street, enthusiastic touts ask if you want to see a ping pong show, saying you only need to order a 100 THB drink. Then they lead you into a dark alley or a second-floor black shop.  
The show is very bad, and when you want to leave, they demand 3,000 THB, claiming the 100 THB drink deal never existed.
translations.幫 Agoda 一哥準備的台灣味伴手禮。\n\n: Preparing Taiwanese-flavored souvenirs for Agoda’s top agent.
translations.從這邊搭一站去 Krung Thon Buri 就是 Silom Line 了。: From here, take one stop to Krung Thon Buri, which is on the Silom Line.
translations.從飯店出發 Grab 車資：THB 577，需要上高速；司機會先代付過路費，最後: Grab fare from the hotel: THB 577, highway toll required; the driver will pay the toll first, and the toll will be added to the final Grab card payment. (I remember it was about THB 50)
translations.想不到這麼巧，2018 年那次跟團員工旅遊來曼谷，大家晚上特別坐計程車來的高空酒: What a coincidence! During the 2018 group employee trip to Bangkok, everyone took a taxi at night to this rooftop bar, which is actually the bar of this hotel XD
translations.我們大約聽到 23:00 時間太晚就先離開了，整場聽下來非常有水準！不管是唱功或: We left around 11:00 PM because it was getting late, but the whole performance was very high quality! Both the singing skills and live performance were impressive! Truly amazing!
translations.我聽過的有： Coldplay, Radiohead, Kings of Leo: Artists I have heard of include: Coldplay, Radiohead, Kings of Leon, Arcade Fire, Oasis, The Killers….
translations.房型： [天際線雙臥室套房 — 有陽台 Skyline 2-Bedroom Su: Room type: [Skyline 2-Bedroom Suite with Balcony](https://jckevin.com/zh-hans/booking2hotels_book/){:target="_blank"}, with an unboxing video later.
translations.房間非常大，是一整間公寓式的房間，一間主臥、一間次臥、雙衛浴、廚房、客廳、陽台。: The room is very spacious, a full apartment-style unit with a master bedroom, a secondary bedroom, two bathrooms, a kitchen, a living room, and a balcony.
translations.托運只能 15 kg，很克制的守住了。\n\n: Checked baggage allowed only 15 kg, strictly adhered to the limit.
translations.找了一家泰式餐廳吃一吃，打拋豬好辣好爽、配蔬菜湯可以緩解它的辣。\n\n: Found a Thai restaurant to eat at. The spicy minced pork was very hot and satisfying, and the vegetable soup helped ease the spiciness.
translations.找到 eSIM 開通信，直接長按 QRCode 選擇 加入 eSIM 即可。\n: To activate the eSIM, simply long-press the QR code and select "Add eSIM."
translations.抵達 `Chong Nonsi` (後來才知道 王權瑪哈納功大廈 就是這一站啊！: Arrived at `Chong Nonsi` (later realized this is the station for King Power Mahanakhon Building!)
translations.抽的也是看體質最好也是漸進式\n: The choice also depends on your constitution; it's best to take a gradual approach.
translations.按完又有體力繼續逛街了，回到 ICONSIAM；一路走到樓上的餐廳，也是弄的很浮: After resting, I had the energy to continue shopping and returned to ICONSIAM; walking all the way to the upstairs restaurant, it was very extravagant with a jungle theme, small bridges with flowing water, and waterfalls. Overall, it was great!
translations.換完錢，有錢了，就在一樓的美食市集補充一下體能；吃了泰式煎餅 (ขนมเบื้อ: After exchanging money and having cash, I refueled at the food court on the first floor; I ate Thai crispy pancakes (ขนมเบื้อง), the sweet kind filled with meringue that tastes very sweet like marshmallow, and also banana pancakes; finally, I bought a cup of iced coffee and continued on.
translations.整個玻璃走廊沒有很大，大概就像飯店的頂樓天際游泳池的大小而已，在旁邊看沒有覺得很: The entire glass corridor isn't very large, roughly the size of a hotel's rooftop infinity pool. From the side, it doesn't look very high, but actually walking on it can still be scary and make your legs weak XD
translations.早上不死心，特別去 [倫批尼公園](https://maps.app.goo.g: In the morning, still determined, I went to [Lumphini Park](https://maps.app.goo.gl/n53FhsjXUUJLnghn6){:target="_blank"} to look for the legendary Bangkok monitor lizards. Due to limited time, I only found a medium-sized lizard basking in the sun.
translations.早上吃完飯店早餐後出門，早餐我覺得還行，但選擇不多。\n\n: After having breakfast at the hotel in the morning, I headed out. I thought the breakfast was okay but the selection was limited.
translations.早上起來就出門到 Central World 逛街。\n\n: Went out in the morning to shop at Central World.
translations.明年就要禁止了，不過可以分享一下經驗。\n\n: It will be banned next year, but I can share some experience.
translations.時間回到 2018 年，出社會的第一份工作第一間公司的員工旅遊、也是我第一次出國: Back in 2018, my first company trip after starting work—and my first time traveling abroad—was a 5-day trip to Bangkok and Hua Hin, Thailand. The following year, 2019, I joined the company trip to Sabah. Then came the two years lost to the pandemic. After it ended, I started going crazy over solo trips to Japan.
translations.時間大約來到 13 點多，出大皇宮後在附近往碼頭方向的西餐廳隨地解決午飯。\n\: Around 1 PM, after leaving the Grand Palace, I grabbed lunch at a Western restaurant near the pier.
translations.時間太早，大家放棄不去。\n\n: It's too early, everyone gave up and decided not to go.
translations.晚上吃完飯點自助餐，去附近夜市逛逛。\n\n: After dinner at the buffet, take a stroll around the nearby night market.
translations.晚餐來這邊覓食，不得不說曼谷的夜市、市集贏台灣太多了，整體環境乾淨、有座位區、不: For dinner here, I have to say Bangkok's night markets and bazaars are far better than Taiwan's. The overall environment is clean, there are seating areas, it's not chaotic, and well organized, making it very comfortable to explore.
translations.曼谷也有 LAWSON!\n\n: There is also LAWSON in Bangkok!
It's best to try gradually: eat 1/3 first, wait a few hours—if nothing happens, then eat 2/3, wait a few hours—if you feel something, then try eating one whole piece...
translations.最後只買了泰國品牌、泰國 Phutawan普妲旺 室內擴香，當紀念品。\n\n: In the end, I only bought a Thai brand, Thailand Phutawan indoor diffuser, as a souvenir.
translations.會喝酒不代表比較耐受\n: Being able to drink does not mean you have a higher tolerance.
translations.會賣酒的時間只有 11:00~14:00、17:00~24:00，佛教節日全天禁: Alcohol sales are only allowed from 11:00 to 14:00 and 17:00 to 24:00. Alcohol sales are prohibited all day on Buddhist holidays.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.有很多畫作、藝術品。\n\n: There are many paintings and artworks.
translations.有要去香港旅遊的朋友，想嘗試不同場地的體驗，可以立即前往看看： [Common: For friends planning to travel to Hong Kong and want to try different venue experiences, you can check it out here: [Common Room Booking Platform](https://www.common-room.hk/c/boatp){:target="_blank"} .
translations.有點像買了一把剪刀但是需要另一支剪刀剪開一樣，eSIM 啟用會需要先連接網路從網: It's like buying a pair of scissors but needing another pair to cut it open. Activating the eSIM requires an internet connection first. Fortunately, my friend traveling with me had already activated their eSIM in Taiwan, so I used their network to activate mine. (There is also Wi-Fi available at the airport, so no need to worry too much.)
translations.機場快線只能買票\n: Airport Rail Link tickets can only be purchased at the station.
translations.泰國不是小費文化的國家，一般來說不用給；我只有按摩才會給 THB 20 小費意思: Thailand is not a tipping culture country, so generally, tipping is not required; I only tip THB 20 for massages as a small gesture.
translations.洽圖洽如果要上廁所，市集外圍有付費廁所 (THB 5 一次)，我有進去上，很乾淨: If you need to use the restroom at Chatuchak, there are paid toilets (THB 5 per use) around the market's perimeter. I used them, and they were very clean with individual stalls, and they were constantly being cleaned. If you prefer not to pay, you can go to the [Mixt Chatuchak](https://maps.app.goo.gl/5PwQcFThBHtFpbzw6){:target="_blank"} mall nearby, which has free and equally clean restrooms.
translations.洽圖洽整個範圍大、攤販密集，但整體乾淨好逛，但東西重複性質高，看起來很多就是賣觀: Chatuchak covers a large area with dense stalls, but it is generally clean and easy to explore. However, many items are repetitive and mostly made in China, targeting tourists.
translations.洽圖洽離 MRT 比較近，但我們要去的王權大夏就在 BTS Chong Nons: Chatuchak is closer to the MRT, but the King Power MahaNakhon building we want to visit is at BTS Chong Nonsi station; walking from Chatuchak to the nearest BTS Saphan Khwai station is about 1 KM (15 mins).
translations.無論你是想找個Party Room慶祝、還是要日租酒店/賓館短住，你都可以使用: Whether you want to find a party room for a celebration or rent a hotel/guesthouse for a short stay, you can easily use the Common Room platform to find your ideal venue!
translations.現在更可以預約香港的船P呀。\n\n: Now you can also book boat parties in Hong Kong.
translations.當初想說跟大家一起行動，我朋友沒有托運(票價大約在 `$6,000` 左右)，後: At first, I thought about traveling with my friends. My friend didn’t check in luggage (ticket price was around `$6,000`). Later, I checked other airlines and felt I missed out; regular airlines charge around `$10,000` for similar times. The price difference isn’t big, but the comfort is much better!
translations.當地交友軟體騙局\n可能約到人妖、仙人跳、騙子\n:
Local Dating App Scams  
You might encounter transgender individuals, extortion schemes, or scammers.
translations.疫情後再訪泰國，曼谷五日快閃自由行。\n\n: Post-pandemic return to Thailand: A 5-day quick trip to Bangkok.
translations.直接上 KKday 買 [**泰國網卡｜AIS 5G高速網路 8日 無限流量+通: Buy directly on KKday [**Thailand SIM | AIS 5G High-Speed Network 8 Days Unlimited Data + Calls eSIM**](https://www.kkday.com/zh-tw/product/137037-ais-16-day-unlimited-data-esim-activate-before-may-3-2023-thailand?cid=19365){:target="_blank"}. After purchase, you will immediately receive the eSIM activation code and can start using it right away.
translations.直達電梯跟台北 101、晴空塔一樣有 360 度場景動畫；高度上大約跟東京鐵塔差: The express elevator features a 360-degree panoramic animation, similar to Taipei 101 and Tokyo Skytree; its height is roughly comparable to Tokyo Tower.
translations.真的很吃又便宜啊！！！前幾天吃外面餐廳一餐其實也要 200–300 起跳，這邊幾: Really delicious and cheap!!! A meal at a restaurant outside costs at least 200–300 THB, but here almost every meal is only THB 50~80.
translations.租機車、租摩托車騙局\n勿壓護照、勿壓護照、勿壓護照\n如果遇到惡意坑殺說損壞要:
Motorbike Rental Scams  
Never leave your passport as a deposit, never leave your passport as a deposit, never leave your passport as a deposit.  
If you encounter malicious claims for damages requiring compensation, leaving your passport will cause trouble.  
Choose large chain rental shops and always record a video of the vehicle condition before renting.
translations.站外就有一家看起來比較新、大間的 (1) THAI GARDEN MASSAGE: Just outside, there is a newer, larger place called (1) THAI GARDEN MASSAGE, but they had no available slots when I asked. Fortunately, I kept walking and found (2) another massage shop as shown in the picture. I found it very comfortable, less crowded, spacious, quieter, and the price was cheap (foot massage/1 hour/THB 270).
translations.算錯帳\n不一定是故意，可以點餐的時候就算好總共金額\n:
Miscalculating the bill  
It's not always intentional; you can calculate the total amount when ordering.
translations.美食街這邊就自己找位子坐，很多當地人也會來吃。\n\n: At the food court, just find a seat yourself; many locals also come here to eat.
translations.老闆好像是華人(中國人)?，感覺像融合中式的泰式料理店，評價很高的老店，貌似也是: The owner seems to be Chinese, and the restaurant feels like a fusion of Chinese and Thai cuisine. It's a well-rated, established place and apparently a favorite of Blackpink's LISA.
translations.聽同事說才知道曼谷機場如果高峰時間來，可以購買 [**泰國機場 BKK 出境 m: I heard from a colleague that if you arrive at Bangkok airport during peak hours, you can purchase the [**Thailand Airport BKK Departure Meet and Greet Fast Track VIP Service**](https://www.kkday.com/zh-tw/product/160605?cid=19365){:target="_blank"} to use the fast lane XD. However, we arrived at a time when almost only passengers from our flight were there, so the clearance was very quick.
translations.臥佛寺裡的彩色舍利塔有一種說不出的壯觀感。\n\n: The colorful chedi inside Wat Pho has an indescribable grandeur.
translations.船到了，工作人員會喊到鄭王廟(沒錯就是中文)，不確定也可以隨時問。\n\n: When the boat arrives, the staff will call out "Wat Arun" (yes, in Chinese). If you're unsure, you can always ask.
translations.船很新、冷氣很涼、封閉式的很安全、班次也蠻多的很方便！\n\n: The boat is very new, the air conditioning is cool, it's fully enclosed and very safe, and there are many trips available, making it very convenient!
translations.蠻有名的景點，2024 還有營業。\n\n: A quite famous attraction, still open in 2024.
translations.裡面很大，跟 ICONSIAM 一樣樣要認真逛的話逛不完…走馬看花，隨手買了一件: It's very large, just like ICONSIAM. If you want to explore thoroughly, you won't finish... I just glanced around and casually bought a shirt.
translations.要到 Central Rama 9 需要轉搭 MRT 地下鐵到 帕藍9站，無法使: To get to Central Rama 9, you need to transfer to the MRT subway to Phra Ram 9 station. Rabbit Card is not accepted; you must buy a ticket or you can now use a VISA card to tap in and out directly.
translations.記得蠻刺激、有探險的感覺，雖然水很混濁跟有味道。\n\n: It was quite thrilling and adventurous, even though the water was murky and had an odor.
translations.請注意 **兔子卡只能用在 BTS** ，不能用在 MRT、機場快線\n: Please note that the **Rabbit Card can only be used on BTS**, not on MRT or the Airport Rail Link.
translations.買一杯 ChaTraMue 手標泰奶補充體力。\n\n: Buy a cup of ChaTraMue Thai Tea to recharge your energy.
translations.買完頂呱呱一樣到第一航廈免費貴賓室坐著休息、吃東西，這次看到有人在充電， [上次: After buying Ding Gua Gua, I went to the Terminal 1 free VIP lounge to sit, rest, and eat. This time, I saw someone charging their devices. [Last time, all the outlets were stripped, but it seems they have been fixed](../cb65fd5ab770/) (?).
translations.越捷位子跟虎航差不多大，都比樂桃大，但椅子不好坐、皮沙發材質不透氣、坐太久屁股會: VietJet Air seats are about the same size as Scoot's, both larger than Peach's. However, the seats are uncomfortable, made of leatherette which isn't breathable, causing discomfort after sitting for a long time.
translations.越捷應該是可以吃自己的東西的，回程有人買芒果糯米飯在上面吃也沒怎樣。\n: VietJet should allow you to eat your own food. On the return flight, someone ate mango sticky rice without any issues.
translations.近看沒有想像中高聳，但是建築風格很特別，比特賽博風。\n\n: Up close, it’s not as tall as imagined, but the architectural style is unique, with a bit of a cyberpunk vibe.
translations.這時間快要下午後雷陣雨了，可以看得出來水流混濁湍急。\n\n: At this time, it's almost afternoon with thunderstorms approaching. You can see that the water flow is muddy and rapid.
translations.這條是支線只有三站，班次比較少。\n\n: This line is a branch with only three stations and fewer trips.
translations.這次才發現原來頂呱呱這邊再往前走直通第二航廈，所以如果很有時間其實可以走去第二航: This time I realized that if you walk past Ding Gua Gua, you can go straight to Terminal 2. So if you have plenty of time, you can actually walk to Terminal 2 to eat; or you can come from Terminal 2 to Terminal 1 to use the free VIP lounge for a rest XD
translations.這次既然都住這裡了，房間放完行李之後也跑上去看看。\n\n: Since we were staying here this time, we went upstairs to take a look after putting our luggage in the room.
translations.這次準備倉促，前一天都還沒準備好網路，也來不及買習慣的實體 SIM 卡，所幸首次: This trip was prepared in a hurry. I hadn't set up my internet the day before and didn't have time to buy my usual physical SIM card. Fortunately, I tried eSIM for the first time. (I fell in love with it after using it)
translations.這瓶水質得給他一張特寫，因為廉航什麼都沒供應想說在機場買水上去喝，但是出境後的礦: This bottle of water deserves a close-up because budget airlines don’t provide anything. I planned to buy water at the airport to drink on the plane, but after passing security, bottled water costs between THB 70 and 100, and this one is THB 100.
translations.逛了一圈先吃了左邊的甜點(類似雞蛋糕?)，跟右邊鹹的海鮮燒，吃起來是 QQ 的，: After walking around, I first tried the dessert on the left (similar to a sponge cake?), and the savory seafood grill on the right. Both had a chewy texture and tasted pretty good.
translations.逛累了就走進裡面的按摩店腳底+一些肩頸按摩。(1 小時/THB 250)\n\n: When tired from walking, step into the massage shop inside for foot and some shoulder and neck massage. (1 hour/THB 250)
translations.進入需拖鞋、臥佛寺臥佛可以繞一圈參拜。\n\n: Shoes must be removed before entering; you can walk around the Reclining Buddha at Wat Pho to pay respects.
translations.進去要先安全檢查，買完票會附送免費寄物，背包類不能攜帶上去(小腰包可以)。\n\: You need to go through a security check first. After buying the ticket, free luggage storage is provided. Backpacks are not allowed inside (small waist bags are permitted).
translations.選擇蠻多的，只要排隊、說你要的號碼、食物卡 QRCode 結帳即可；也可以外帶(: There are quite a few options. Just queue up, say the number you want, and pay with the food card QR code. Takeout is also available (I remember they charge an extra THB 10 for packaging).
translations.那時候小菜雞一枚、社會經驗 0，矇矇懂懂的跟著哥哥姊姊一起出去，連飛機什麼能帶什: At that time, I was a total newbie with zero social experience. I blindly followed my older brother and sister without knowing what could or couldn’t be brought on the plane. During security check, I foolishly put my passport on top of the tray and almost freaked out when I saw it fall off the conveyor belt (if it had slipped into the gap, I wouldn’t have gotten it back). That trip was a mindless group tour with bus rides, so my impression of Bangkok was vague—just remembering the great rooftop bar, hot weather, cheap stuff, and affordable massages. I had no idea about the geography at all.
translations.限時促銷優惠：即日起至2024年12月31日，活動期間內激活啟用可享高速流量15: Limited Time Promotion: From now until December 31, 2024, activate during the event period to enjoy a high-speed data boost from 15GB to 30GB. After 30GB, speed will be reduced to 384 Kbps without disconnection.
translations.階梯、頂樓休息區面對的就是有名的透明玻璃走廊，可以直接垂直看到地面，自己從旁邊箱: The stairs and rooftop lounge face the famous transparent glass corridor, which allows you to see straight down to the ground. You can take shoe covers from the nearby box to enter, but **bringing phones is prohibited. You can ask your companions or staff to help take photos.**
translations.離下午四點還很早，又又又來吃一航頂呱呱，這次發現可以單點呱呱包了，以前只賣炸雞！: It's still early before 4 PM, so once again, I came to eat Yi Hang Ding Gua Gua. This time, I found out they now offer Gua Gua buns à la carte, which used to be just fried chicken!
translations.電梯上來會先到 74 樓室內觀景台，這邊有一家咖啡廳跟公共座位可以稍做休息；要繼: The elevator first takes you to the indoor observation deck on the 74th floor, where there is a café and public seating for a short rest. To reach the outdoor observation deck on the top floor, you need to transfer to another elevator or take the stairs up to the 78th floor.
translations.需要有一個人是醒著，有事能照顧，比較安全\n: There should be someone awake to take care of things for better safety.
translations.頂樓可以環視整個曼谷，可以想像晚上的夜景應該也很美！\n\n: The rooftop offers a panoramic view of the entire Bangkok city, and you can imagine the night scenery must be beautiful as well!
translations.飯店是 Villa 形式，每間都是獨棟，游泳池可以環繞整個飯店的每間房間，泳池旁: The hotel features a villa style, with each room being a standalone building. The swimming pool surrounds every room in the hotel, and there is a bar right next to the pool. The beach outside is an undeveloped area, completely barren.
translations.飯店照片沒拍幾張，只拍了一張早上醒來發現被子裡有一隻大馬陸的驚嚇照。\n\n: I didn’t take many photos of the hotel, just one in the morning when I woke up and found a giant centipede in the blanket—a real scare.
translations.飯店陽台不一定能吸菸，要問\n: Smoking may not be allowed on the hotel balcony, so be sure to ask.
translations.黑松沙士、麥香奶茶、維他露 P、義美泡芙、蝦味先、維力炸醬面、鳳梨酥、波的多蚵仔: HeySong Sarsaparilla, Malt Milk Tea, Vitasoy P, I-Mei Cream Puffs, Shrimp Crackers, Wei Lih Instant Noodles with Soybean Paste, Pineapple Cake, Potato Chips with Oysters by Bodo, Cola-flavored Snacks, Green Guai Guai Snacks
translations.點了海鮮炒泡麵(THB 50) + 豬排薯條 (THB 59) = THB 10: Ordered seafood fried instant noodles (THB 50) + pork chop with fries (THB 59) = THB 109
